allow: PowerShell($p = Get-Process dart | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; $cpu1 = $p.CPU; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $p.Refresh\(\); $cpu2 = $p.CPU; "CPU delta in 5s: $\($cpu2 - $cpu1\) sec")

PowerShell($before = Get-Process dart -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { @{Id=$_.Id; CPU=$_.CPU} }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $after = Get-Process dart -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { @{Id=$_.Id; CPU=$_.CPU} }; foreach\($b in $before\) { $a = $after | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq $b.Id } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($a\) { "PID $\($b.Id\): +$\([math]::Round\($a.CPU - $b.CPU, 3\)\)s" } })
